source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/230926 기술문서 & 임상평가 보완 리뷰 2 (with 컨설팅)/CE MDR TD 보완_230926/A-TCF-5-163 Label and packaging specification (rev.1).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Labeling, packaging, symbol descriptions, CE marking, and IFU reference information for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW detector products.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation by specifying product labels, single unit and transport packaging, operating and storage environment limits, symbols, CE marking requirements, and IFU reference.
keyPoints: Product label list includes A1717MCW Detector Label, A1417MCW Detector Label, F1417MCW Detector Label, Detector Sub Label, Exposure Switch Label, and Shipment Label.
Single unit packaging section lists packaging item sizes including Box-Packing, cushion components, and Master Box-Detector ve.
Operating and storage environment limits include temperature, humidity, and pressure ranges.

Symbol descriptions include manufacturer, date/country of manufacture, serial number, UDI, medical device, CE marking, authorized representative in the European Community, and U.S. prescription-use restriction.
CE marking section states conformity in accordance with Annex V of Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
Instructions for Use refers to A-TCF-5-130 User Manual.

evidence.claim: Storage and transport temperature limits are -15 to 55 degrees Celsius, and operation temperature is 10 to 35 degrees Celsius.
Storage and transport humidity is 10 to 95% H.R., and operation humidity is 20 to 75% H.R.

evidence.claim: The labeling includes a U.S. prescription-use restriction statement.
evidence.evidenceText: Federal (US) law restricts this device to sale by or on the order of a licensed physician or properly licensed practitioner.

evidence.claim: CE marking conformity is described in accordance with Annex V of Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
evidence.evidenceText: CE marking of conformity in accordance with Annex V of Regulation (EU) 2017/745

evidence.claim: The CE marking shall consist of the initials CE, maintain proportions if reduced or enlarged, and have substantially the same vertical dimension not less than 5 mm unless waived for small-scale devices.
evidence.evidenceText:
The CE marking shall consist of the initials ‘CE’ taking the following form:

If the CE marking is reduced or enlarged, the proportions given in the above graduated drawing shall be respected.

The various components of the CE marking shall have substantially the same vertical dimension, which may not be less than 5 mm. This minimum dimension may be waived for small-scale devices.

evidence.claim: The document revision is Rev. No. 1.
The date of issue field is present but not populated with a specific date.

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not available as a concrete date; source only states 'Date of issue: 날짜'.
Authority metadata says 'MFDS/domestic', but source text primarily references CE MDR, Regulation (EU) 2017/745, European Community, and a Federal (US) labeling restriction.
Some packaging size text appears incomplete or potentially OCR-derived, such as '1289mm * 882mm * 70' without a final unit and 'Master Box-Detector ve'.
Notified body number is referenced in the CE marking symbol description but no notified body number is provided.
